The Discovery of Coffee Started with a Dance.
We Make
Coffee Worth Dancing About.
When you take your first sip, great coffee sets your body into motion.
Dance your way to better coffee, and a better day.
See What "Coffee worth dancing about" means
Honoring the
Discovery of Coffee
In the remote highlands of 9th century Abyssinia, now Ethiopia, a lone goatherder named Kaldi noticed his goats were full of energy, dancing and prancing, after eating a small red fruit from a nearby shrub.
We honor the discovery of coffee by making coffee worth dancing about.
That means sustainably sourcing coffee from long-time producing partners and serving coffee with passion and expertise. It means making every cup delicious by focusing on what we do best: finding delicious coffees, roasting them with intent and care, and serving them to you with passion and energy.
We’re People Who
Love Coffee
When you work here, it’s not hard to get amped up  (and not just because of all the coffee). We love working with each other. We love making coffee the right way. We love coming up with new ways to bring you the best coffee.
Our team is where expertise meets true passion for doing things the right way, every time.
Join Our Team
Over 30 years
of smart, sustainable, exceptional coffee in your cup
Every bag of coffee we produce is made from sustainable relationships and a team that takes coffee and service seriously (and not much else).
Farm to Cup: Making High-Impact Coffee for You
GROWING
We’re proud to have decades-long relationships with many of our coffee producers around the world, promoting sustainable, environmentally-friendly processes that result in the best beans.
PROCESSING
Our growing partners are the best at what they do. The cherries are picked at peak ripeness, milled, sorted, and shipped across the world.
ROASTING
Our artisan roasters don’t begin roasting your beans until you’ve ordered them. That ensures maximum freshness for every order. It’s how we make sure you have the best cup of coffee possible.
BREWING
All of our staff receive in-depth training from our award-winning coffee instructors. Our baristas don’t even get to use the machine until they’ve spent a few m

What
"Coffee Worth Dancing About"
Really Means
It's drinking a cup that's the product of great sourcing, roasting, people, and service.
Legend has it that coffee was discovered by an Ethiopian goatherd named Kaldi. He noticed his goats were full of energy—dancing and prancing—after eating the red cherries from a nearby shrub. He tried them himself, felt that same spark, and coffee was born.
That spirit is the heartbeat of our name and our tagline. Coffee Worth Dancing About isn’t just a catchy phrase; it’s a promise that what’s in your cup will make you feel as good as those legendary goats.
But what actually goes into a cup that good — a cup that goes beyond just helping you wake up in the morning? To us, it’s about what stands behind your coffee, not just what’s inside in your mug: the sourcing, roasting, the team, and the service.
SOURCING
Great coffee starts with great relationships. We don't just buy green coffee; we build partnerships, many of which go back decades.
From the Miersch family in Nicaragua to the La Minita farm in Costa Rica, our longest-standing partners are central to our identity. As we expand into regions like El Salvador with the Pacas family and Colombia with the Monserrate Community, we continue to seek out producers who meet our strict criteria for quality and sustainability and have a desire to form something lasting.
When you drink a mug of Dancing Goats Blend, you are tasting centuries of combined experience. It’s quality you can taste, and a story you can feel great about. So great, you may feel the urge to dance.
ROASTING
Roasting is where art meets science. Yes, we are data-obsessed, tracking every second and degree of temperature. But ultimately, a great roast is also about feeling.
We roast for balance and sweetness. The coffee bean is one of the most complex foods on earth, holding a world of flavor inside. Our job is to let that inherent beauty shine through, accentuating it with a rich, sweet base. Whether it’s our lightest roast or our darkest, it was crafted with intent to ensure everything you taste is delicious and reverent to its producers.
Care, experience, craft

meta.meta_description: Home to specialty single origin coffee and blended coffees and the legendary Dancing Goats® Blend. Over thirty years, roasting exceptional coffees. Honoring farmers and their families with direct, working partnerships and fair pricing.
